no: BETA: Finalization mod for IWD-in-EET. Requires IWD1_EET and/or IWD2_EET. Handles worldmap integration. Install AFTER IWD mods, BEFORE EET_End

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Finalization mod for IWD-in-EET conversions that must be installed after other mods but before EET_End, handling worldmap and transition integration.
